questionHtml:
The graph shows changes in the membrane potential in an action potential.

What is the approximate value of the threshold potential?

A. −88 mV

B. −70 mV

C. −50 mV

D. +45 mV

meta.title: The graph shows changes in the membrane potential in an action potential. What is the approximate value of the threshold potential? A. −88 mV B. −70 mV C. −50 mV D. +45 mV
